scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan "bun --cwd web-Backend dev" "bun --cwd web-Frontend dev"
scripts.deploy: bun run --cwd web-Frontend build && bun -e "import { spawnSync } from 'child_process'; import { randomUUID } from 'crypto'; const token = randomUUID(); console.log('Deploying Worker...'); const w = spawnSync('bun', ['run', 'deploy'], { cwd: 'web-Backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); if (w.status !== 0) process.exit(w.status); console.log('Setting KV token...'); const kv = spawnSync('bun', ['x', 'wrangler', 'kv', 'key', 'put', '--binding=NORDGEN_KV', 'global:deploy_token', token, '--remote'], { cwd: 'web-Backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); if (kv.status !== 0) process.exit(kv.status); const d = process.env.DEPLOY_DOMAIN || 'nordgen.selfhoster.win'; console.log('Syncing database...'); for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) { try { const r = await fetch('https://' + d + '/api/sync', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + token } }); if (r.ok) { console.log('Sync OK'); process.exit(0); } if (r.status !== 401 || i === 14) { console.error('Sync failed', await r.text()); process.exit(1); } } catch (e) { if (i === 14) { console.error('Sync error', e.message); process.exit(1); } } await new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, 3000)); }"
